content.text:
Partially — we have the shell, but not the onboarding data needed to fully integrate AsiaRe into group reporting.

What’s already present:
- `FutuRe/AsiaRe` business unit node
- `FutuRe/AsiaRe/Analysis` local analysis hub
- `FutuRe/AsiaRe/Analysis/AnnualReport`
- `FutuRe/AsiaRe/TransactionMapping/MappingRules`

What appears missing or incomplete:
- No local Line of Business entries under `FutuRe/AsiaRe/LineOfBusiness`
- Mapping rules document is only a placeholder; no actual split rules defined
- Group-level annual report description still says AsiaRe mapping is pending
- I also hit an error trying to list layout areas for `FutuRe/Analysis`, so I can’t confirm the group analysis is ready to consume AsiaRe inputs from that route

Bottom line:
- Enough to start onboarding structurally
- Not enough to onboard functionally into group profitability aggregation

Minimum missing inputs for AsiaRe onboarding:
- AsiaRe local LoB list
- Local-to-group TransactionMapping percentage rules
- Validation/governance notes for those mappings
- Confirmation that group analysis/report wiring includes AsiaRe

If you want, I can next:
1. inspect the AsiaRe setup thread for onboarding notes, or
2. compare EuropeRe/AmericasIns structures so we can identify the exact missing pieces for AsiaRe.
